about.title: About eSIMba
about.description: eSIMba is a leading online platform providing international eSIMs, helping you connect to the internet anytime, anywhere without worrying about physical SIMs or high roaming fees.
about.missionDesc: We believe that connecting to the world shouldn't be complicated or expensive. With eSIMba, you can easily buy and activate eSIM in just a few minutes, before or right after arriving at your destination.
benefits: No physical SIM needed, reducing the risk of losing/changing SIM
Competitive prices, much lower than traditional roaming

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: eSIMba is committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our services.
infoCollected: Order information: purchase history, order details
Device information: Device type, operating system (used to optimize service)

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.description: Please read these terms of service carefully before using eSIMba's services. By accessing and using the website, you agree to comply with these terms.
terms.usageDesc: eSIMba's eSIM service is provided for personal and non-commercial use. You are not allowed to copy, distribute, or modify any content on the website without our written consent.

faqs.a: eSIM is an embedded electronic SIM on your device, replacing traditional physical SIM cards. You can activate eSIM over the network without inserting a card.
Most new devices (iPhone 11 and above, Samsung S20 and above, Google Pixel 4 and above) support eSIM. Please check your device's specifications to confirm.

faqs.q: How long after payment do I receive eSIM?
faqs.a: You will receive a QR code and eSIM activation instructions immediately via email after successful payment.
eSIM cannot be returned after activation. Please check carefully before purchasing. If you have any issues, please contact our support team.

howToUseSteps.title: 1. Check eSIM support
howToUseSteps.desc: Before purchasing, make sure your device supports eSIM and is network unlocked.

howToUseSteps.title: 2. Purchase and receive eSIM
howToUseSteps.desc: Choose a suitable eSIM plan, pay, and receive a QR code via email.

howToUseSteps.title: 3. Activate eSIM
howToUseSteps.desc: Scan the QR code on your device to install eSIM and activate the data plan.

support.contactDesc: If you have any questions, please contact us via the channels below.
